objective: Advance the research system to V1.7 by removing implementation-carrier logic and focusing only on SW industry indexes, current industry valuation explanation, price-derived historical validation, compact Chinese outputs, and research-only governance.

acceptance_checks.description: Run V1.7 on real AkShare public SW industry index data with compact outputs and refreshed history.
Audit that V1.7 validation uses the compact output layout.
acceptance_checks.command: python .\scripts\audit_compact_output_layout.py --output-dir .\outputs\industry_index_research_validation --required-debug-files all_ranked_industries.csv raw_industry_panel.csv agent_results.json historical_feature_panel.csv rankic_report.csv group_return_report.csv topn_backtest.csv validation_decisions.csv current_research_basket.csv research_basket_summary.csv real_data_audit.json

acceptance_checks.description: Audit the industry index factor registry after V1.7 migration.
Audit task brief governance after V1.7 migration.

decision_boundary: V1.7 remains research-only. Current PE/PB/dividend yield can explain the current cross-section but cannot be used for historical PIT validation until enough archived valuation snapshots exist. Historical validation uses only PIT price-derived industry index features and forward labels.
research_boundary: Research-only validation; no individual stocks, no trading signal, no order generation, no sample data, and no validated alpha promotion.
